note: The full class picture. Erik: we did martial — what about magi, stealth, etc.? Answer: this world doesn't have fixed classes; it has ARCHETYPES = a universal-role lens × a Reach, exactly like martial backgrounds (martial_paths.json) = Warrior × Reach. A 'magus' isn't one class — it's the SEEKER/MAKER lens expressed through whichever Reach, so a chaos-magus and an order-magus are as different as a chaos-warrior and an order-warrior. This doc names the non-martial archetype families, what each IS in this world, and which Reaches express it. Archetypes are soft: a character is really 'this role, from this place, drifting this pole' — the archetype is the recognizable shape, not a locked class. Extends universal_roles + skill_functions + martial_paths. Authored by Aevi (PO).
principle: Every archetype = a ROLE (the need it fills) × a REACH (the method). The functions are universal (a magus and a warrior both need to affect the world); the flavor is the Reach's. There is no 'mage class' — there is the way order shapes reality (Latticework), the way chaos does (Wildcraft), the way meaning does (Numenwork). Pick a role-shape and a home, and the archetype falls out. This keeps the world legible (you recognize a 'stealth' character) AND infinitely varied (an Umbral stealth and a Wildcraft stealth share nothing but the goal).

archetypes.whatItIsHere: One who bends reality directly through a tradition's deep principle — the closest thing to a 'mage.' Not one class: the shaping IS the Reach. A Magus reshapes the world by the grammar of their pole.

byReach.as: The Latticewright (order-magus) — binds reality into rule and structure; vs the Unspooler (chaos-magus) who breaks and improvises. Same 'shape reality,' opposite method.
The Numen (spirit-magus) — shapes by meaning and attention; vs the Enginewright (mechanism-magus) who shapes by built system.
The Vivimancer / Paleworker — shapes the quick and the ending.
The Radiant / Umbral — shapes by revelation or concealment.

archetypes.signature: deep single-Reach mastery; the Magus is who drifts pole-hot fastest — the classic power-vs-foreclosure temptation.

archetypes.whatItIsHere: One who works unseen — infiltration, concealment, the unwitnessed act. Fits this world through MORE than one Reach, which makes 'stealth' genuinely varied.

byReach.as: The Umbral — the true stealth-tradition: Seeing Dark, the Harbor, move unseen. Hides in shadow.
The Churn-ghost — hides in NOISE and unpredictability; lost in chaos rather than shadow.
The Veilwright — stealth by DISGUISE and illusion, not darkness; hidden in plain sight behind a false face.
The Soma-ghost — stealth by perfect bodily control; the silent, still, unnoticed body.

archetypes.signature: conceal+move heavy; the archetype the current corpus UNDER-serves (only 8 conceal abilities) — flagged for expansion.

archetypes.whatItIsHere: One who perceives the hidden truth — of a place, a person, a mystery, the coordinate-world itself. This world is BUILT for seers (rune-casting reads pole-intensities; the whole map is discoverable). The most world-native archetype.

byReach.as: The Truthwarden (Verity) — pierces deception, speaks the unfalsifiable word.
The Radiant seer — reveals by burning light; nothing hidden survives.
The Attender (Numenwork) — True Attention; reads meaning-truth.
The Reader — Pathos (reads feeling) or Logos (deduces truth).

archetypes.signature: reveal-heavy — the corpus's MOST-served function (41!), so seers are rich; the risk is reveal-glut (see skill audit).

archetypes.whatItIsHere: One who tends, heals, and keeps the vulnerable — already deep (martial_paths Thorn-Warden is its militant cousin). The peaceful healer-archetype.

byReach.as: Vivimancer (heals the living) / Ashwarden (tends the dying) — the two faces.
The Steadier (Numenwork) — heals spirit by presence.
The Deepfeeler (Pathos) — heals feeling, shares grief.
The Soma-tender — heals by bodily craft.

archetypes.signature: heal+shield+ward; travels to where a locale can't tend itself (the life-warden in the Cogitarium).

archetypes.whatItIsHere: One who builds, mends, inscribes, and makes — the crafter. Fits this world sharply through the substrate/inscription model: a Maker who INSCRIBES leaves persistent will behind them.

byReach.as: The Enginewright — deep machine/Precursor building.
The Churn-maker (Orrin) — improvised wonders / the Latticewright — structured build.
The Block-crafter — builds by manifest grammar.

archetypes.signature: mend+bind+ward; the natural INSCRIPTION user (will_expression_modality) — leaves wards, sigils, persistent works.

archetypes.whatItIsHere: One who moves people — negotiation, de-escalation, persuasion, rousing. The social 'class,' and the natural driver of SNG-027 social contests. This world's talk-heavy center of gravity.

byReach.as: The Stillcrafter — de-escalates, brokers truce.
The Deepfeeler (Pathos, moves by feeling) / the Reasoner (Logos, moves by proof).
The Veilwright (persuades by constructed story) / Truthwarden (by unfalsifiable truth).

archetypes.signature: bind+reveal social; carries the social-contest system; pairs with universal_roles Mediator.

howClassesWork.notFixed: A character is not 'a Magus.' They are a role-shape + a homeland + a drift. 'Magus' is the recognizable name for Seeker+Maker-through-a-Reach. This is why the game needs no class list — the archetypes EMERGE from role×reach, and a player can blend (a Seer who also fights = a Blaze-Lance who reads truth).
howClassesWork.atCreation: SNG-017 creation offers role+homeland; the archetype is the flavor label shown ('you're shaping up as an Umbral Shadow'). Guide-me mode picks a coherent archetype kit; full-control blends freely.
howClassesWork.multiclass: Blending is the cross-Reach combination system (SNG-026) — a two-archetype character is literally a walking source of cross-domain braids. The class-cost/capacity system (skill_capacity crossClass) prices the breadth; combination is the payoff. Multiclassing isn't bolted on — it's the core depth mechanic.
howClassesWork.generation: SNG-020 authors NPCs as archetype instances (role×reach×disposition), so generated characters read as recognizable types without a class enum.

buildImplication: No new engine — archetypes are a LENS over existing role+reach+function data, surfaced as flavor labels at creation/level-up (SNG-041 UI can show 'you're becoming a ___'). Content: this doc + the martial_paths doc together name the full archetype space. The skill-audit (separate) addresses whether each archetype's abilities are actually good. Flag: Shadow/stealth (conceal) and the two thin new Reaches (emotional_logical, falsehood_truth at 2 each) are under-served — expand for archetype parity.
